summary: Handheld single-scene footage of ICE ERO officers and U.S. Marshals walking a handcuffed man (a Mexican femicide fugitive) through a border-crossing port for handover to Mexican authorities, ending on a posed perp-walk frame with the cuffed man between two 'ERO' and 'U.S. MARSHAL' vested agents. There is no music track (low music_score 0.34), no stylized cutting, color grade, or genre framing - it is unedited documentation of a removal/handover. Out of scope.
